focus_points.label: Workload & capacity
focus_points.description: Sustainability of pace; signs they're drowning, bored, or protecting their time badly.
label_examples: Ramp pacing in the first six months (junior)
Oncall vs feature work split (senior IC)

focus_points.label: Priorities & goals
focus_points.description: What they're saying yes and no to; alignment with team and company bets.
label_examples: What 'done' looks like for the current sprint (junior)
How they're sequencing the top-three initiatives (lead)

focus_points.label: Blockers & dependencies
focus_points.description: What's slowing them down — technical, organisational, interpersonal, or a decision that's stuck.
label_examples: Where another team is the bottleneck
Tooling/infra friction on the daily loop

focus_points.label: Energy & wellbeing
focus_points.description: Motivation and stress level; burnout signals; trajectory since last time.
label_examples: Motivation trend vs three months ago
Reconnecting with why the work matters

focus_points.label: Team connection
focus_points.description: Belonging, trust, and the day-to-day texture of working with teammates.
label_examples: Peer trust as a new tech lead

focus_points.label: Growth & development
focus_points.description: Where they're actively stretching; skills they want to build; what would unlock the next step.
label_examples: Stretch from IC to tech lead
Skills gap for the next promotion

focus_points.label: Feedback (given & received)
focus_points.description: Feedback they've given or received recently; feedback they want but aren't getting.
label_examples: Direct feedback on the last launch
Upward feedback they wish they could give you

focus_points.label: Recognition & achievements
focus_points.description: Whether their contribution feels seen; wins worth naming out loud.
label_examples: The win from the payments launch
Quiet contributions the team hasn't noticed

focus_points.label: Role clarity
focus_points.description: How clear the scope, expectations, and bar for 'good' are for their level.
label_examples: Scope of the new team-lead role
How success is measured for the CTO this quarter

focus_points.label: Manager support
focus_points.description: What they need from you that they aren't currently getting.
label_examples: Air cover on the exec conversation
Simply more time with you each week

focus_points.label: Quality
focus_points.description: Craft and correctness; edge cases, polish, defect rate, and taste.
label_examples: Bug rate on the last three launches

focus_points.label: Speed
focus_points.description: Pace of delivery and responsiveness; how quickly work moves through them.

focus_points.label: Ownership
focus_points.description: End-to-end follow-through on outcomes — not just tasks — without being chased.
label_examples: Owning a launch from scope to post-mortem
Taking a gnarly legacy area and making it theirs

focus_points.label: Communication
focus_points.description: Clarity of their writing and talking; whether stakeholders feel informed.
label_examples: Exec summaries that land in one read

focus_points.label: Reliability
focus_points.description: Consistency against commitments; whether you can count on the date they gave.
label_examples: Hitting the dates they commit to

focus_points.label: Judgment
focus_points.description: Quality of calls on tradeoffs; knowing when to push on and when to escalate.
label_examples: When to ship vs when to polish
When to raise a flag to you vs handle it

focus_points.label: Collaboration
focus_points.description: How they raise the room: help they give, context they share, input they accept.
label_examples: Sharing context proactively in design reviews

focus_points.label: Impact
focus_points.description: Size and leverage of what they ship; how much the team or business moved because of them.
label_examples: Leverage via mentoring and design reviews

focus_points.label: Decision making speed
focus_points.description: How fast they decide and unblock; whether they get stuck in analysis.
label_examples: Unblocking the team on the routing decision

focus_points.label: Technical problem solving
focus_points.description: Depth and rigor on hard technical problems; how they break down what they don't know yet.
label_examples: Learning a new stack under a deadline

focus_points.label: Stakeholder engagement
focus_points.description: How they manage relationships beyond the immediate team — trust, expectations, hard news.
label_examples: Working with Product on roadmap tradeoffs

focus_points.label: Delegation effectiveness
focus_points.description: Trusting others with real work; coaching instead of grabbing the keyboard.
label_examples: Coaching mids to run their own specs

focus_points.label: Cross-team alignment
focus_points.description: Reducing friction at team boundaries; keeping other teams in the loop.
label_examples: Avoiding last-minute surprises for other teams

focus_points.label: Risk assessment accuracy
focus_points.description: Flagging real risk early without crying wolf; calibration.
label_examples: Calling the migration risk two weeks out
